items.title: Communicable disease threats report, 14-22 May 2026, Week 21
items.title_en: Communicable disease threats report, 14-22 May 2026, Week 21
items.body: This issue of the ECDC Communicable Disease Threats Report (CDTR) covers the period 14-22 May 2026, and includes updates on hantavirus, chikungunya, Ebola disease outbreak, avian influenza, measles, and an overview of respiratory virus epidemiology in the EU/EEA.
items.body_en: This issue of the ECDC Communicable Disease Threats Report (CDTR) covers the period 14-22 May 2026, and includes updates on hantavirus, chikungunya, Ebola disease outbreak, avian influenza, measles, and an overview of respiratory virus epidemiology in the EU/EEA.

items.title_en: Hantavirus, Ebola, Covid-19 : enrayer les maladies infectieuses implique de changer notre rapport au vivant
items.body: Nos sociétés disposent de capacités à produire des réponses techniques immédiates à des crises complexes. Mais elles éprouvent plus de difficultés à s’interroger sur leurs causes structurelles, relève le professeur en immunologie Jean-Daniel Lelièvre.
items.body_en: Nos sociétés disposent de capacités à produire des réponses techniques immédiates à des crises complexes. Mais elles éprouvent plus de difficultés à s’interroger sur leurs causes structurelles, relève le professeur en immunologie Jean-Daniel Lelièvre.

items.title: Hantavirus isn’t very contagious, but it can spread from human to human
items.title_en: Hantavirus isn’t very contagious, but it can spread from human to human
items.body: Social media users around the world have been claiming that hantavirus can’t be spread from one human to another. However, scientists have confirmed that the strain of the virus that circulated on the MV Hondius cruise ship can indeed be transmitted that way, though it isn’t very contagious.
items.body_en: Social media users around the world have been claiming that hantavirus can’t be spread from one human to another. However, scientists have confirmed that the strain of the virus that circulated on the MV Hondius cruise ship can indeed be transmitted that way, though it isn’t very contagious.

items.title_en: Hantavirus : un nouveau cas confirmé chez un membre d'équipage du "MV Hondius" rapatrié aux Pays-Bas, annonce l'OMS
items.body: Ce malade est isolé depuis son arrivée aux Pays-Bas. Le bilan du foyer d'hantavirus est désormais de "12 cas signalés et trois morts", précise l'Organisation mondiale de la santé.
